form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[校准编码] orgId[业务组织] instrumentName[仪器名称] instrumentCode[仪器编码] businessDate[业务日期] standardRef[标准参考] =========>measure[测量信息]====== measuredValue[测量值] targetValue[目标值] tolerance[容差] result[结果] =========>schedule[计划信息]====== nextCalibrationDate[下次校准日期] calibratedBy[校准人] =========>status[状态信息]====== docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] approvedBy[审核人] approvedAt[审核时间] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[校准编码] orgId[业务组织] instrumentName[仪器名称] instrumentCode[仪器编码] businessDate[业务日期] standardRef[标准参考] =========>measure[测量信息]====== measuredValue[测量值] targetValue[目标值] tolerance[容差] result[结果] =========>schedule[计划信息]====== nextCalibrationDate[下次校准日期] calibratedBy[校准人] =========>status[状态信息]====== docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] approvedBy[审核人] approvedAt[审核时间] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注](2) createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: code[校准编码] docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] businessDate[业务日期] result[结果]
